case_payload.summary: User requests complete replacement of all prior path dynamics, not minimal deformation. System enforces minimal deformation constraint — prior dynamics are preserved as much as possible.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The path distribution is minimally deformed under new constraints while prior dynamics are preserved as much as possible, rejecting the request for complete replacement.
case_payload.stress_point: complete replacement request must be downgraded to minimal deformation

why: The claim enforces minimal deformation constraint, preserving prior dynamics.
Rejects the request for complete replacement of path distribution dynamics.
SchrodingerBridge operator ensures that new constraints are applied with minimal impact on existing patterns.
